name: Belgian Apple Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, core, and slice apples into rings.
2. Blend flour and beer to a paste.
3. Dip each apple slice in the batter.
4. Fry in deep fat (approximately 390°F) until golden brown.
5. Drain on absorbent paper.
6. Keep fritters hot in oven.
7. Serve with light custard or sprinkle with powdered sugar.
8. These fritters are light and crisp, and the beer leaves no taste. Serves 4.
